svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="ReAct Loop" id="react-loop"> <mxGraphModel dx="1329" dy="1446" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="800" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=24;fontColor=#333333;" value="<b>ReAct 循环 — 事件驱动架构</b><br><font style="color: rgb(153, 153, 153);">序号 1～7表示一条用户消息的完整生命周期</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="560" x="400" y="-60" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="user" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#78909c;strokeColor=#546e7a;fontColor=#ffffff;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;arcSize=50;" value="👤 用户消息" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="200" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="queue" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ff8a65;strokeColor=#e65100;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;" value="<b>阻塞队列</b>
<font style="font-size:9px">会话级等待 · talk()</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="90" x="220" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_user_queue" edge="1" parent="1" source="user" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#555555;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#ff6b35;labelBackgroundColor=#fafbfc;" target="queue" value="1.对话"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.013" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bus" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ff6b35;strokeColor=#e65100;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=12;arcSize=15;" value="<b style="font-size:15px">⭐ 事件消息总线</b><br><font style="font-size:10px">concern() 判断</font><br><font style="font-size:9px;color:#ffcc80">publish() → 线程池 → 订阅者</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="430" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_queue_bus" edge="1" parent="1" source="queue" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#e65100;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#ff6b35;labelBackgroundColor=#fafbfc;" target="bus" value="2.发布对话事件"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="pool" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff3e0;strokeColor=#e65100;fontColor=#e65100;fontSize=12;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 4;strokeWidth=2;" value="<b>🚀 线程池</b>
<font style="font-size:9px;color:#bf360c">每消息一线程 · 并发派发</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="140" x="730" y="275" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_bus_pool" edge="1" parent="1" source="bus" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#e65100;strokeWidth=2;fontStyle=1;fontSize=11;fontColor=#ff6b35;labelBackgroundColor=#fafbfc;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="pool" value="3.并发消费"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="brain" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#26a69a;strokeColor=#00897b;fontColor=#ffffff;fontSize=12;arcSize=10;" value="<b style="font-size:14px">🧠 Brain 推理引擎</b>
<font style="font-size:10px">订阅者 · 关注: 用户消息 / 工具结果 / 授权</font>
─────────────────────
<font style="font-size:10px;color:#b2dfdb">处理链 → LLMCallProcessor → 🤖 LLM</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="260" x="660" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_pool_brain" edge="1" parent="1" source="pool" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeColor=#26a69a;strokeWidth=2;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="brain" value="<font color="#e65100"><span style="font-size: 8px;
